descripcion:
**Rent this Charming Bungalow in Nueva Torrevieja**

**Property Description**

Discover your new home on the beautiful Costa Blanca! This charming 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom bungalow is east-facing and located in the peaceful neighborhood of Nueva Torrevieja. Just a few steps from local amenities and a pleasant walk to the beach, this property is perfect for those seeking a cozy getaway in sunny Spain.

**Property Features**

- **Bright Space:** Enjoy an open-plan living and dining area filled with natural light, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.
- **Functional Kitchen:** A fully equipped open kitchen, perfect for everyday cooking or entertaining your guests.
- **Comfortable Bedroom:** Double bedroom with a built-in wardrobe, providing ample storage space and comfort.
- **Outdoor Living:** Relax on the front terrace or in the private garden area, perfect for enjoying your morning coffee or soaking up the Spanish sun.
- **Move-In Ready:** Fully furnished and ready for you to start enjoying your new home immediately.

**Ideal Location**

- **Close to the Beach:** Just a 20-25 minute walk to the stunning beaches of Torrevieja, perfect for sunbathing, swimming, or dining by the sea.
- **Local Amenities:** Bars, restaurants, and shops are within walking distance, ensuring convenience and a lively atmosphere.
- **Accessibility:** Alicante airport is only a 40-minute drive away, making this property easily accessible for international travelers.

**Living in Nueva Torrevieja**

Nueva Torrevieja combines the charm of a residential neighborhood with the proximity to the vibrant life of Torrevieja. Enjoy the Mediterranean lifestyle with sunny weather year-round and a variety of recreational activities nearby.

**Your New Getaway on Costa Blanca**

This bungalow is perfect for a vacation escape, rental, or cozy home. Don’t miss the opportunity to experience the Costa Blanca lifestyle. Contact us today to schedule a visit and make this wonderful property yours.

---

descripcion:
Brand New Modern Chic House with 50m² Private Sunny Garden - Steps from Playa de los Locos

Descripción:

Looking for the perfect sun-drenched retreat to call home?
Welcome to your newly renovated sanctuary near the Mediterranean. This stunning duplex-style townhouse has been completely transformed into a modern, high-end living space, designed for those who value comfort, style, and outdoor living. Located in a quiet and charming row-house community just a short stroll from the famous Playa de los Locos, this property offers the best of the Costa Blanca lifestyle.

The House: Modern, Bright & Brand New
Inside, you’ll find 60 m² of intelligently designed space where every inch has been optimized. This is a "total refurbishment" (2026): everything from the floors and plumbing to the furniture and appliances is brand new.

Three Bedrooms: Thoughtfully furnished with high-quality, brand-new mattresses and bedding to ensure a premium rest.

Two Modern Bathrooms: Sleek finishes, new tiling, and powerful showers for a spa-like feel.

Gourmet Kitchen: Fully equipped with top-tier appliances, including a dishwasher, large fridge-freezer, and washing machine. Everything you need for long-term living.

Living Area: A cozy, chic space perfect for relaxing after a day at the beach, featuring contemporary furniture and a seamless flow.

The Highlight: 50m² Private Sunny Garden & Terrace
The true "wow factor" of this home is the massive 50 m² private garden/terrace on the ground floor.

All-Day Sun: Its orientation ensures plenty of natural light, making it the perfect spot for morning coffees, al fresco dining, or sunbathing in total privacy.

Pet Friendly: We know pets are part of the family. The large, enclosed terrace provides a safe and spacious area for your furry friends to enjoy the Spanish sun.

Location & Lifestyle
Located in a prime area, you are within walking distance of the vibrant promenade, local restaurants, supermarkets, and the crystal-clear waters of Playa de los Locos. Whether you are a remote worker looking for a sunny office or a small family seeking a high-quality long-term rental, this house is ready for you to move in and be its very first tenant.

Key Features:

Recently renovated (2024).

Fully furnished with brand-new, modern furniture.

High-speed internet ready (perfect for digital nomads).

Large sunny 50m² garden.

Pet friendly.

Don't miss the chance to live in a "brand new" home by the sea. Contact us today for a private viewing!

titulo: Country House in Crevillente, for rent
descripcion:
Your Ideal Long-Term Retreat in the Heart of the Crevillente Mountains

Escape the noise, embrace the calm, and make yourself at home in this charming countryside villa nestled in the breathtaking Crevillente mountains. This fully fenced 1,000 m² private plot offers a rare blend of privacy, comfort, and natural beauty — a true sanctuary for those seeking long-term living in a peaceful, rural setting.

Whether you're looking to work remotely surrounded by nature, retire in tranquility, or simply enjoy a slower pace of life without sacrificing comfort, this home ticks all the boxes.

🏡 Property Highlights:

Spacious 1,000 m² private plot, fully fenced and surrounded by Mediterranean landscape.

Private swimming pool — perfect for cooling off during the summer or relaxing on the weekends.

Covered BBQ area, ideal for outdoor dining, entertaining guests, or simply enjoying the fresh air all year round.

Expansive east-facing terrace, where you can start your day with a coffee and panoramic views of the sunrise over the mountains.

🛋️ Interior Designed for Comfort & Functionality:

Inside, the home offers a warm and welcoming layout, designed with everyday living in mind:

Bright and cozy living room with large windows and a wood-burning stove — perfect for winter evenings.

Open-plan kitchen with breakfast bar and ample storage, ideal for cooking daily meals or hosting.

Three generous bedrooms, suitable for families, guests, or setting up a home office.

Two full bathrooms, one of which is adapted for people with reduced mobility, ensuring comfort and accessibility for everyone.

This property is not just beautiful — it’s practical and move-in ready for long-term living.

🌿 A Space to Live, Grow, and Enjoy:

Whether you’re a nature lover, remote worker, artist, or someone looking for a quieter lifestyle, this home offers endless possibilities:

Create your own vegetable garden or Mediterranean-style landscaping.

Set up a creative studio, workshop, or wellness space.

Host friends and family in a spacious, private environment.

You'll enjoy peace and privacy — but never isolation.

📍 Perfect Location – Quiet Yet Well-Connected:

Just a short drive to Crevillente town center, where you'll find supermarkets, shops, healthcare, and other essential services.

Easy road access and well-connected to surrounding towns and cities.

Only 30 minutes to the beaches of the Costa Blanca and Alicante International Airport, ideal for visitors or occasional travel.

💼 Why It’s Perfect for Long-Term Renters:

Low maintenance outdoor space — ideal for year-round living without constant upkeep.

Fully fenced and secure — suitable for pets, children, or those who value privacy.

Excellent internet and mobile coverage — remote workers welcome.

Quiet, respectful neighborhood with other long-term residents nearby.

✅ Your New Life Starts Here

If you're ready to enjoy a simpler, healthier, and more relaxed lifestyle — without compromising on comfort — this countryside home near Crevillente is the perfect long-term rental opportunity.

🏡 Available now for long-term rental.
📅 Contact us to schedule a viewing or request more information.

titulo: Villa in Crevillente, for rent
descripcion:
This beautiful country house offers you a quiet and charming refuge in the middle of a natural environment. Situated on a large 6,000 m² plot, surrounded by lush vegetation and fruit trees, this property is perfect for those looking for a relaxed country lifestyle. The house itself has four spacious rooms, offering comfort and privacy to all its occupants. The rooms are elegantly decorated and feature windows that allow in natural light and provide panoramic views of the surrounding landscape. With ample built-in wardrobes, there is plenty of storage space available. The house also has two complete bathrooms, equipped with modern accessories and high-quality finishes. Both bathrooms are designed to offer comfort and functionality. The underground closed garage is a prominent feature of this property, providing security and protection for your vehicles, as well as additional space for storage. The exterior of the house is simply stunning. A large garden area surrounds the property, with manicured gardens and fruit trees that add a touch of natural beauty. The private pool is the perfect place to cool off on hot summer days and enjoy relaxing moments in the sun. In addition, the large plot offers more than enough space for outdoor activities, such as barbecues, family gatherings or even growing your own produce in the garden. The country house is located in a quiet and serene environment, away from the bustle of the city, allowing you to enjoy the peace and quiet of country life. However, it is also conveniently located near services and amenities, giving you the option of exploring the surrounding area or easily accessing shops, restaurants, and other attractions. In summary, this country house with four bedrooms, two bathrooms, a closed underground garage, private pool and a large plot with fruit trees is a true paradise for those looking to escape the hustle and bustle and enjoy the natural beauty of the countryside. With its rustic charm, modern conveniences, and ample outdoor space, this property offers a unique opportunity to enjoy a peaceful and relaxing life in the midst of nature.

For short or long term

Detached villa for long-term rent located in La Cotoveta urbanization (Mutxamel), a quiet residential area about 15–20 minutes by car from Alicante and El Campello.
This property is ideal for people looking for privacy, outdoor space and a peaceful environment. Please note that this is not a central location and nothing is within walking distance, so a car is essential.
The house offers approximately 140 m² of living space with 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, a private swimming pool and outdoor areas.
Important information before requesting a viewing:
• The property is located in a quiet residential urbanization, not in the town center.
• A car is required for daily life (shopping, beach, city, etc.).
• Best suited for a couple or a small family looking for a calm lifestyle.

Viewings will only be arranged with people who have watched the video and confirm that the property and location meet their expectations.
If you are looking for peace, space and a private home in a quiet area, this property could be a great fit.

titulo: Country House in Muchamiel, for rent
descripcion:
Charming Long-Term Villa Nestled Between Mountains and Sea – Costa Blanca, Alicante

This truly charming villa offers a perfect blend of natural beauty, peaceful surroundings, and modern convenience. Tucked away between the mountains and the Mediterranean Sea, in the highly sought-after Costa Blanca region, this property is ideal for long-term tenants seeking a relaxing lifestyle with all the comforts of home.

Prime Location

Located just outside the vibrant city of Alicante, the villa offers the best of both worlds: tranquil living and easy access to urban amenities. Alicante boasts everything you might need for an extended stay—supermarkets, healthcare facilities, schools, public transport, shopping centers, and a rich cultural and culinary scene.

The Alicante-Elche International Airport is just a short drive away, offering convenient national and international travel connections.

Nearby, you’ll find white sandy beaches with crystal-clear, warm Mediterranean waters, as well as stunning mountain trails perfect for hiking, biking, or simply enjoying nature.

Panoramic Views and Natural Surroundings

Set on the slope of a mountain, the villa offers breathtaking panoramic views of both the sea and the city. In the evenings, you can relax in the garden and watch the sun set over the Mediterranean. At night, enjoy the twinkling city lights and the beautifully lit Santa Bárbara Castle from your own backyard.

Surrounded by a lush palm garden, the home provides a private, serene environment ideal for those seeking peace and quiet.

Property Features & Outdoor Living

Designed with long-term comfort in mind, the villa is fully equipped and includes a variety of amenities to enhance your day-to-day living:

Spacious Terrace with Oversized Awning: Provides generous shade over the patio, ideal for enjoying the outdoors year-round. A cozy rattan seating area with a dining table makes it perfect for al fresco meals or relaxing with a book.

Private Pool: Medium-sized and elevated on the hillside, offering uninterrupted views of the sea. Great for both exercise and leisure.

Well-Maintained Garden with Leisure Facilities:

Trampoline (up to 60kg), great for kids or light adult use.

Basketball hoop for fun and fitness.

Various shaded areas and green spaces to relax, meditate, or entertain.

Accessibility & Parking

Wheelchair Accessible: The entrance to the home is fully accessible via a wide ramp (no stairs), making it ideal for elderly tenants or those with mobility challenges.

On-site Parking: Multiple parking spaces available within the garden area for convenience and security.

Perfect for Long-Term Living

This villa is not just a vacation rental—it’s a true home designed for comfortable, long-term living. Key long-stay features include:

High-speed Wi-Fi – ideal for remote work or streaming.

Fully equipped kitchen – with all necessary appliances and ample storage.

Dedicated laundry area.

Space to set up a home office or study.

Optional garden and pool maintenance service available.

Heating and cooling systems for year-round comfort.

Whether you're a family, remote worker, retiree, or anyone looking to enjoy the Mediterranean lifestyle long-term, this villa offers an exceptional opportunity to live in one of Spain’s most beautiful and desirable coastal regions—without compromising on comfort, privacy, or accessibility.

titulo: Luxury Villa in Muchamiel, for rent
descripcion:
Discover the perfect luxury retreat in this expansive villa with breathtaking mountain views and a private pool. Nestled in a peaceful and exclusive area of Muchamiel, on the stunning Costa Blanca, this magnificent home offers space, privacy, and high-end comfort for an unforgettable stay.

Recently renovated to the highest standards, this grand villa boasts modern amenities while maintaining an elegant and welcoming atmosphere. Ideal for families or groups seeking a tranquil escape, it provides the perfect setting to relax and unwind in style.

Enjoy a refreshing swim in the large private pool or savor a glass of wine on the spacious terrace while taking in the serene mountain landscape. The fully equipped state-of-the-art kitchen allows you to prepare gourmet meals to enjoy indoors or al fresco. And with the nearest beach just a short drive away, you can easily combine the tranquility of the mountains with the charm of the Mediterranean coast.
